name: raydium
description: Fetches Raydium DEX data: liquidity pools, farming opportunities, APY, TVL, and trading volumes for Solana token pairs. Use this to discover yield opportunities, analyse pool liquidity, or compare farming rewards across Raydium pools. Input: plain-language description, e.g. "Get top liquidity pools by TVL" or "Find best APY for SOL/USDC".
